title: OPAC Commands
description: A recreation of the OPAC - Better Commands mod for modern fabric, this mod simplifies and improves the commands of the Open Parties and Claims mod
body:
This mod adds aliases for Open Parties and Claims commands.

`/openpac-claims` -> `/claims`

`/openpac-claims claim` -> `/claim`

`/openpac-claims unclaim` -> `/unclaim`

`/openpac-parties` -> `/party`

`/opm` -> `/pc`

The original commands still work as well.

Inspired by the mod **[OPAC - Better Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/opac-bettercommands)** for Neoforge 1.21.1
